steps.title: Use sample proportion to estimate population
steps.content: A random sample's observed proportion is our best estimate for the entire population's proportion. The sample found that 20% intend to enroll in the study program, so we estimate that 20% of all 55 Spanish club students intend to enroll.

steps.title: Calculate 20% of 55
steps.content:
$$0.20 \times 55 = 11$$
This gives us the estimated number of students who intend to enroll in the study program. That matches choice A — A is correct.
